summary: Frontend-only validation completed for Supabase typing/refactor scope. Safe-state UI without Supabase vars works on desktop/mobile; TypeScript and web export pass; lint currently fails; one functional `as any` cast remains.

integration_issues.issue: `yarn lint` fails with React hooks/compiler errors (e.g., `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect`, `react-hooks/purity`, `react-hooks/preserve-manual-memoization`) in booking/admin/barber and related screens.
Found non-style functional any cast: `/app/src/components/screens/AppointmentsExperience.tsx` uses `router.push(... as any)`.
`yarn export:web` is not defined in package.json; working command is `yarn build:web`.

action_items: Fix lint errors currently blocking the requirement 'TypeScript, lint e export web passam'.
Remove remaining functional any cast in AppointmentsExperience route push (keep only React Native web style casts if required).
Keep `types:supabase` behavior as-is (clear failure without SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID) and optionally align docs/CI to `yarn build:web` instead of `yarn export:web`.
critical_code_review_comments: Supabase client is correctly typed with `createClient<Database>` and generated types are wired through `src/types/database.ts` mappings.
Files previously >1000 lines are now under 1000 (`AdminDashboardExperience`: 802, `BarberDashboardExperience`: 827, `booking.tsx`: 916).
Sub-components `AdminQuickBook/AdminReschedule` and `ProfessionalQuickBook/ProfessionalReschedule` preserve callback contracts and testIDs in static review.
Safe fallback when Supabase env is absent is implemented in `_layout.tsx` and rendered correctly on desktop/mobile via data-testid checks.
test_credentials: Read `/app/memory/test_credentials.md`. Authenticated flow execution was intentionally skipped because EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are unavailable in this workspace; validated safe no-config state plus static authenticated-flow code.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run after lint fixes and functional any removal. Safe-state UX is already verified in browser automation. If Supabase env vars are restored, execute full authenticated e2e for admin/professional/public booking behavior.
rca of the issue: Main blocker for full acceptance is not runtime crash anymore; it is static quality gate mismatch: lint fails under current rule set and one functional `as any` remains. Reproduction: run `yarn lint` (fails), run `rg -n "as any" /app/src` (shows route cast in AppointmentsExperience).
